settings.title: API Key
settings.description: The OpenAI API uses API keys for authentication. Visit your [API Keys](https://platform.openai.com/account/api-keys) page to retrieve the API key you'll use in your requests.

settings.title: Base URL
settings.description: The base endpoint to use. See the [OpenAI API documentation](https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/chat/create) for more information.

settings.title: API Key

settings.title: Base URL

settings.title: API Key

settings.title: Base URL

settings.title: API Key
settings.description: The Qwen (Alibaba DashScope) API uses API keys for authentication. Visit your [API Keys](https://bailian.console.alibabacloud.com/?apiKey=1) page in Alibaba Cloud Model Studio to retrieve the API key you'll use in your requests.

settings.title: Base URL
settings.description: The base OpenAI-compatible endpoint to use. Use `https://dashscope-intl.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1` for international (Singapore) access or `https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1` for users in mainland China. See the [DashScope OpenAI-compatible API documentation](https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/model-studio/compatibility-of-openai-with-dashscope) for more information.

models.name: Qwen3.7 Max
models.description: Alibaba's newest flagship agent model — sustained autonomous execution over 1000+ tool calls and 35-hour task horizons. Strong coding, debugging, and long-horizon agentic workflows. Toggle deep thinking with `enable_thinking`.

settings.title: API Key
settings.description: Ollama runs locally and needs no API key by default. Leave this empty unless you put Ollama behind an authenticating proxy.

settings.title: Base URL
settings.description: The OpenAI-compatible endpoint exposed by your local Ollama server. Defaults to `http://localhost:11434/v1`. See the [Ollama OpenAI compatibility docs](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/openai.md) for more information.
